overall.description: Gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima depicting a samurai character walking through a traditional Japanese building interior before exiting into a vast mountain landscape at dawn. The character traverses a wooden bridge and walks along a path through fields of white wildflowers with misty mountains in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: traditional Japanese inn interior with paper lanterns

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dimly lit interior past wooden counters and seated patrons toward the exit

notable_agents.action: NPC in red robes sitting near the exit door
patrons sitting at low wooden tables

entered.detail: traditional white paper lanterns hanging from the ceiling
wooden lattice doors with paper panels allowing striped sunlight to enter
low wooden serving counters along the left wall
woven straw mat flooring covering the ground

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the interior of a traditional Japanese building with wooden architecture and paper lanterns. Sunlight filters through shoji screens casting striped shadows across the tatami mats. A few NPCs are seated inside as the character approaches the exit doors.

scene_state.functional_zone: building exit porch leading to mountain settlement

events.description: character exits the traditional building into the outdoor mountain environment
emerging from shadowed interior into bright golden hour sunlight

agents.ego_description: stepping out of the building onto a wooden deck and into the settlement area

notable_agents.action: white horses grazing near the wooden fence

entered.detail: traditional wooden gate structure marking the entrance to the sacred area
forested mountains with mist hanging in the valleys
rustic wooden post fencing lining the path

segments.scene_description: The character exits the building onto a wooden porch, transitioning from the dim interior to a bright, misty morning landscape. The camera reveals a stunning view of forested mountains in the background and a wooden torii gate ahead. White horses graze near a fence to the right as the character steps onto the dirt path.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain meadow path through white wildflowers

events.description: character passes under the wooden torii gate structure
entering dense fields of white flowers lining both sides of the path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a narrow dirt path through expansive fields of white flowers toward the distant mountains

entered.detail: dense fields of white wildflowers swaying in the breeze
tall green grass and vegetation surrounding the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a winding dirt path through vast fields of white wildflowers with forested mountains rising in the background. Morning mist hangs in the valleys as the golden sun creates a warm glow across the landscape. The character passes under the torii gate and continues deeper into the flower-filled meadow.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate, shadowed interior of a traditional Japanese building out into a vast, sun-drenched mountain wilderness. It begins inside a wooden structure where sunlight filters through shoji screens to cast striped shadows across tatami mats and seated NPCs. As the character approaches the exit, the scene transitions from the dim interior onto a wooden porch, suddenly revealing a bright, misty morning landscape featuring a distant torii gate and white horses grazing by a fence. The camera then follows the character onto a winding dirt path, where the environment opens up into expansive fields of white wildflowers beneath forested mountains. Finally, the lighting shifts to a warm golden glow as the character passes under the torii gate and moves deeper into the mist-covered meadow.
